title: phlomitis
intro: Phlomitis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family, which consists of about 20 species of shrubs and herbs native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomitis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other menstrual issues. Phlomitis is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as salves and creams.
